flashcards.front: What is the primary function of the AVD Manager?
flashcards.back: To create and manage Android Virtual Devices, which are configurations for the Android Emulator.

flashcards.front: What command would you use to install an APK from your computer onto a connected device?
Which tool compiles and packages Android app resources (like XML layouts) and generates the R.java file?
What is the role of the JDK in Android development?
flashcards.back: It provides the compiler (javac) to turn Java/Kotlin source code into Java bytecode (.class files), which is a necessary step before the d8 tool can create .dex files.
